response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the Reference JSON for the initial stanzas, confirming the song 'Shion'. However, the Reference JSON is incomplete for this 5-minute video, so I have transcribed the remaining verses and final chorus using both audio and on-screen text. Timing is strictly aligned with the vocal audio waveform, ensuring no text appears during instrumental sections.

subtitles.original: 真っ赤な夕空
subtitles.english: A bright red evening sky

subtitles.original: 青くなる星
subtitles.english: A star turning blue

subtitles.original: 心臓を焦がして
subtitles.english: Scorching my heart

subtitles.original: 冷めない温度
subtitles.english: A temperature that won't cool

subtitles.original: 半端に零した声の残響と
subtitles.english: With the echo of a voice half-uttered

subtitles.original: 半端に混ざった花の色
subtitles.english: And the colors of flowers half-mixed

subtitles.original: 立ち止まって芽を育てても
subtitles.english: Even if I stop and nurture the buds

subtitles.original: きっと咲いた瞬間に散ってしまう
subtitles.english: They'll surely scatter the moment they bloom

subtitles.original: 薄れてしまった記憶を抱えて
subtitles.english: Holding onto memories that have faded away

subtitles.original: 光の影にあなたを探す
subtitles.english: I search for you in the shadows of the light

subtitles.original: まるで鏡合わせのような
subtitles.english: As if we were reflections in a mirror

subtitles.original: 偽物だらけの世界でも
subtitles.english: Even in a world full of fakes

subtitles.original: あなたが笑ってくれるなら
subtitles.english: If only you would smile for me

subtitles.original: それだけで良かったのに
subtitles.english: That alone would have been enough

subtitles.original: 擦り切れてしまった言葉を
subtitles.english: The words that have been worn out

subtitles.original: 拾い集めては閉じ込めた
subtitles.english: I gathered them up and locked them away

subtitles.original: 届かない声が空に溶けて
subtitles.english: The voice that won't reach melts into the sky

subtitles.original: 夜を越えて 朝を待つ
subtitles.english: Passing through the night, waiting for the morning

subtitles.original: 真っ赤な夕空青くなる星
subtitles.english: A bright red evening sky, a star turning blue

subtitles.original: 心臓を焦がして冷めない温度
subtitles.english: Scorching my heart, a temperature that won't cool

subtitles.original: 半端に零した声の残響と
subtitles.english: With the echo of a voice half-uttered

subtitles.original: 半端に混ざった花の色
subtitles.english: And the colors of flowers half-mixed

subtitles.original: 立ち止まって芽を育てても
subtitles.english: Even if I stop and nurture the buds

subtitles.original: きっと咲いた瞬間に散ってしまう
subtitles.english: They'll surely scatter the moment they bloom

subtitles.original: 薄れてしまった記憶を抱えて
subtitles.english: Holding onto memories that have faded away

subtitles.original: 光の影にあなたを探す
subtitles.english: I search for you in the shadows of the light

subtitles.original: さよならは言わないよ
subtitles.english: I won't say goodbye

subtitles.original: いつかまた会えるその日まで
subtitles.english: Until the day we can meet again

subtitles.original: この歌をあなたに届けるよ
subtitles.english: I'll deliver this song to you

subtitles.original: 忘れないでいてね
subtitles.english: Please don't forget me
